playlist_strategy: A progressive escalation of relentless, high-bpm industrial techno, aggressive EBM, and dark synthwave designed for max-effort gym sessions. The flows starts with a low-slung mechanical warm-up, heavily ramps up into abrasive, distorted peaks for heavy lifting, and cools down with atmospheric cyber-downtempo.

tracks.title: Rusty Pistons
tracks.youtube_title: Rusty Pistons ⚙️ Industrial Warm-Up | Focus & Prep
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial midtempo instrumental, 105 bpm, D minor, slow crushing groove, distorted analog bassline, metallic clanking percussion, dark atmospheric synth pads, slow building arrangement, strong mechanical bass hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a muscular man tying his lifting shoes in a dimly lit, gritty industrial gym. Focused determination, sweat on brow. Shallow depth of field, striking contrast, rust orange and slate gray color palette, atmospheric YouTube dark mode optimized.
tracks.youtube_description: Kickstart your training session right. ⚙️ Dark, methodical industrial midtempo beats designed to dial in your focus and get the blood flowing before the heavy iron comes out. Get in the zone. 🦾 #IndustrialMusic #GymMotivation #WarmupMusic

tracks.title: Forged In Steel
tracks.youtube_title: Forged In Steel ⛓️ Dark Industrial Training Anthem
tracks.style_prompt: Dark electro instrumental, 115 bpm, F minor, driving 4/4 beat, gritty arpeggiated synth bassline, punchy drum machine layered with factory noises, rhythmic industrial synth riff hook within first 5 seconds, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a female athlete wrapping hands with red tape. Intense concentration, cinematic lighting. Shallow depth of field, gunmetal blue and crimson lighting, gritty underground gym setting, YouTube dark mode optimized.
tracks.youtube_description: Channel your inner machine. ⛓️ Hard-hitting dark electro to elevate your heart rate and prepare your nervous system for the impending battle. Stay locked in and unyielding. 💥 #DarkElectro #GymMusic #Focus

tracks.title: Iron Output
tracks.youtube_title: Iron Output ⚡ Heavy Industrial Beats for Lifting
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: neon green, toxic yellow, pitch black
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive EBM instrumental, 128 bpm, E minor, relentless driving groove, massive distorted kick drums, aggressive FM synth stabs, punchy industrial drum intro hook within first 5 seconds, explosive drops, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of chalked hands gripping a heavily loaded barbell. Raw aggression, cinematic harsh lighting. Shallow depth of field, neon green and toxic yellow contrast against pitch black, industrial warehouse gym, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Time to push volume. ⚡ Aggressive EBM and heavy industrial music engineered to force out those final reps. Pounding drums and distorted synths for maximum muscle growth and output. 😤 #HeavyLifting #IndustrialBeats #Gym

tracks.title: Maximum Load
tracks.youtube_title: Maximum Load 🚨 Hardcore Industrial Techno Workout
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: blood red, concrete grey, strobe white
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial Techno instrumental, 135 bpm, G minor, punishing four-on-the-floor groove, deep rumbling sub bass, distorted 909 kicks, relentless white noise hi-hats, massive bass groove hook within first 5 seconds, sustained high-energy arrangement, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a massive powerlifter mid-squat, veins popping, screaming with explosive power. Blood red and concrete grey lighting with strobe effects. Gritty industrial background, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Load the bar. 🚨 Pure, unfiltered industrial techno designed for brutal heavy compound lifts. Relentless BPM and punishing bass to drown out the weakness and elevate your sheer strength. 🦍 #Powerlifting #TechnoWorkout #Heavy

tracks.title: Nervous System Override
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: radioactive green, harsh magenta, void black
tracks.style_prompt: Hard Techno instrumental, 145 bpm, A minor, apocalyptic groove, crushing overdriven schranz drums, screaming acid synth lines, cinematic siren rise intro hook within first 5 seconds, massive explosive drops, frantic arrangement, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of an athlete's face covered in chalk, screaming in berserker rage after a massive deadlift. Radioactive green and harsh magenta rim lighting. Shallow depth of field, hyper-intense contrast, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: PR TIME. ☢️ The ultimate peak-energy hard techno track to completely override your nervous system. 145BPM of sheer auditory violence designed for 1-rep max attempts and breaking plateaus. Unleash hell! 👹 #HardTechno #PRMusic #Deadlift

tracks.title: Hydraulic Press
tracks.youtube_title: Hydraulic Press 🔨 Crushing Industrial Bass For Gym
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: warning yellow, hazard orange, dark steel
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial Crossbreed Drum and Bass instrumental, 174 bpm, C minor, breakneck frantic groove, tearing reese basslines, heavy distorted snare drums, punchy amen break intro hook within first 5 seconds, relentless sustained intensity, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of a shredded athlete mid-air during a box jump or sprint. Pure adrenaline rush, motion blur on limbs. Warning yellow and hazard orange lighting, dark steel background, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Unrelenting speed and power. 🔨 Breakneck 174BPM industrial drum and bass hybrid to push your HIIT and cardio sessions past the redline. Keep your feet moving and let the heavy bass drive you forward! 🏃‍♂️💨 #DnBWorkout #HIIT #FastPaced

tracks.title: Machine Grinder
tracks.youtube_title: Machine Grinder 🩸 Unstoppable Gym Motivation Music
tracks.style_prompt: Aggressive Cyberpunk Midtempo instrumental, 100 bpm, C# minor, stomping heavy groove, massive sawtooth sub bass, huge cinematic heavy toms, cyberpunk synth riff hook within first 5 seconds, glitch stutters, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a female powerlifter gritting her teeth during a grueling bench press. Cyberpunk pink and cyan neon lighting cutting through midnight blue darkness. Gritty metallic textures, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Keep grinding. 🩸 A massive, stomping midtempo cyberpunk track with bone-rattling bass. Perfect for grueling, slow, and heavy sets where giving up isn't an option. Become the machine. 🦾 #CyberpunkMusic #GymGrind #HeavyBass

tracks.title: Lactic Acid
tracks.youtube_title: Lactic Acid Burn 🧪 Dark Acid Techno For Endurance
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: acid green, pure black, alien purple
tracks.style_prompt: Dark Acid Techno instrumental, 138 bpm, B minor, hypnotic driving groove, squelching TB-303 synth lines, rapid endless hi-hats, deep thumping kick drum, hypnotic acid bass intro hook within first 5 seconds, long sustained hypnotic arrangement, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium close-up of an endurance athlete on an assault bike, sweat flying, eyes locked in a hypnotic trance state. Acid green and alien purple lighting, deep black shadows, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Push through the burn. 🧪 Hypnotic, fast-paced acid techno designed to put you into a flow state for long cardio or endurance sessions. Ignore the lactic acid, keep the rhythm. 🚴‍♀️💨 #AcidTechno #Endurance #CardioMusic

tracks.title: Coolant Leak
tracks.style_prompt: Industrial Downtempo instrumental, 90 bpm, D minor, slow sparse groove, echoing metallic drum hits, cold sweeping cinematic synth pads, ambient mechanical drones, cinematic atmospheric intro hook within first 5 seconds, cooling and fading arrangement, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, close-up of a muscular man sitting on a gym bench, head resting on hands in exhausted relief. Cool blue and frosted white lighting, charcoal shadows. Steam rising off shoulders, YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: You survived. 🧊 Atmospheric, heavy industrial downtempo to help lower your heart rate and start the recovery process. The work is done. Time to rebuild and cool down. 🧘‍♂️ #CooldownMusic #PostWorkout #IndustrialAmbient

tracks.title: System Shutdown
tracks.thumbnail_color_palette: deep violet, black hole, soft indigo
tracks.style_prompt: Dark Ambient Drone instrumental, 70 bpm, A minor, no percussion or minimal pulse groove, deep evolving synth drones, filtered mechanized noise sweeps, soft ethereal synth melody hook within first 5 seconds, highly atmospheric and calm arrangement, hi-fi modern production quality.
tracks.image_prompt: Cinematic 35mm photography, medium wide shot of a female athlete doing deep stretches on a mat in an empty, dark industrial gym. Peaceful focus, soft indigo and deep violet lighting illuminating the concrete floor. YouTube dark mode.
tracks.youtube_description: Power down. 🔌 Deep, dark ambient and synth drones for an immersive stretching and deep recovery session. Focus on your breathing, relax the central nervous system, and prepare for tomorrow. 🌌 #StretchingMusic #DarkAmbient #Recovery
